title: helictotrichon pratense
intro: Helictotrichon pratense, also known as false buffalo grass, is a type of perennial grass native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Helictotrichon pratense can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies for its purported healing properties.
